records.question: Which individuals with the last name Herzog and maiden name Kunde, suffix JD, and SSN 999-63-4552, holding passport X24000430X, born on or after 1978-05-25, have central_american ethnicity?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
WHERE patients.suffix = 'JD' AND patients.ssn = '999-63-4552' AND patients.last = 'Herzog' AND patients.passport = 'X24000430X' AND patients.birthdate >= '1978-05-25' AND patients.ethnicity = 'central_american' AND patients.maiden = 'Kunde'
records.pred_sql: SELECT patient FROM patients WHERE suffix = 'JD' AND ssn = '999-63-4552' AND last = 'Herzog' AND passport = 'X24000430X' AND birthdate >= '1978-05-25' AND ethnicity = 'central_american' AND maiden = 'Kunde'

records.question: Which individuals are white women with the prefix Mrs., maiden name Carroll, last name Pouros, driver’s license S99935903, no passport, ethnicity English, and who died on or before 2009-02-23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN medications ON patients.patient = medications.patient
JOIN encounters ON medications.encounter = encounters.id
WHERE patients.race = 'white' AND patients.prefix = 'Mrs.' AND patients.maiden = 'Carroll' AND patients.drivers = 'S99935903' AND patients.passport = 'FALSE' AND patients.deathdate <= '2009-02-23' AND patients.last = 'Pouros' AND patients.ethnicity = 'english'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN encounters AS T3 ON T2.ENCOUNTER = T3.ID WHERE T1.race = 'white' AND T1.prefix = 'Mrs.' AND T1.maiden = 'Carroll' AND T1.drivers = 'S99935903' AND T1.passport = 'FALSE' AND T1.deathdate <= '2009-02-23' AND T1.last = 'Pouros' AND T1.ethnicity = 'english'

records.question: Which individuals named Dusty, who are white Polish men with the prefix Mr., were born in Somerville MA US and live at 3224 Christop Roads Somerville MA 02143 US?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN conditions ON patients.patient = conditions.patient
WHERE patients.birthplace = 'Somerville MA US' AND patients.first = 'Dusty' AND patients.prefix = 'Mr.' AND patients.address = '3224 Christop Roads Somerville MA 02143 US' AND patients.race = 'white' AND patients.ethnicity = 'polish' AND patients.gender = 'M'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.patient WHERE T1.birthplace = 'Somerville MA US' AND T1.first = 'Dusty' AND T1.prefix = 'Mr.' AND T1.address = '3224 Christop Roads Somerville MA 02143 US' AND T1.race = 'white' AND T1.ethnicity = 'polish' AND T1.gender = 'M' GROUP BY T1.patient

records.question: Which individuals who are white and born in Norton MA US have German ethnicity, an SSN of 999-89-8740, childhood asthma with a reason code at most 233678006.0, and a house dust mite allergy?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN encounters ON patients.patient = encounters.patient
JOIN allergies ON patients.patient = allergies.patient
WHERE patients.ethnicity = 'german' AND encounters.reasondescription = 'Childhood asthma' AND allergies.description = 'House dust mite allergy' AND encounters.reasoncode <= 233678006.0 AND patients.ssn = '999-89-8740' AND patients.race = 'white' AND patients.birthplace = 'Norton MA US'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 WHERE T1.ethnicity = 'german' AND T1.ssn = '999-89-8740' AND T1.race = 'white' AND T1.birthplace = 'Norton MA US' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM encounters AS T2 WHERE T1.patient = T2.PATIENT AND T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Childhood asthma' AND T2.REASONCODE <= 233678006.0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM allergies AS T3 WHERE T1.patient = T3.PATIENT AND T3.DESCRIPTION = 'House dust mite allergy' )

records.question: Who has the maiden name Wehner and lives at 1188 Gage Tunnel Suite 586 Hingham MA 02043 US with both encounters and medications recorded?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN encounters ON patients.patient = encounters.patient
JOIN medications ON patients.patient = medications.patient
WHERE patients.maiden = 'Wehner' AND patients.address = '1188 Gage Tunnel Suite 586 Hingham MA 02043 US'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 WHERE T1.maiden = 'Wehner' AND T1.address = '1188 Gage Tunnel Suite 586 Hingham MA 02043 US' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM encounters AS T2 WHERE T1.patient = T2.PATIENT ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medications AS T3 WHERE T1.patient = T3.PATIENT )

records.question: Who are the white individuals with last name Senger, born on or after 2002-11-18 in Longmeadow MA US, who have an allergy to tree pollen?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN allergies ON patients.patient = allergies.patient
WHERE patients.last = 'Senger' AND patients.birthdate >= '2002-11-18' AND allergies.description = 'Allergy to tree pollen' AND patients.race = 'white' AND patients.birthplace = 'Longmeadow MA US'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.last = 'Senger' AND T1.birthdate >= '2002-11-18' AND T1.race = 'white' AND T1.birthplace = 'Longmeadow MA US' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to tree pollen'

records.question: Which individuals with the SSN exactly 999-55-1956 and passport exactly X10571629X have received immunizations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN immunizations ON patients.patient = immunizations.patient
WHERE patients.ssn = '999-55-1956' AND patients.passport = 'X10571629X'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 WHERE T1.ssn = '999-55-1956' AND T1.passport = 'X10571629X' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM immunizations AS T2 WHERE T2.PATIENT = T1.patient)

records.question: Which entries have a passport exactly equal to X21056513X and a deathdate exactly on 1984-04-24?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
WHERE patients.passport = 'X21056513X' AND patients.deathdate = '1984-04-24'
records.pred_sql: SELECT patient FROM patients WHERE passport = 'X21056513X' AND deathdate = '1984-04-24'

records.question: Who has the last name Kovacek and has any of the conditions listed in all_prevalences?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN conditions ON patients.patient = conditions.patient
JOIN all_prevalences ON conditions.description = all_prevalences.item
WHERE patients.last = 'Kovacek'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN all_prevalences AS T3 ON T2.DESCRIPTION = T3.ITEM WHERE T1.last = 'Kovacek'

records.question: Who has the prefix Mr., lives at 5129 Barton Rapids Suite 716 Tyngsborough MA 01879 US, was born on 1991-12-28, and was born in Wareham MA US?
records.gold_sql:
